markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content marketing strategy and brand building for AnySource, a new AI security company.](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AnySource needs to build brand awareness and authority in the MCP (Managed Cloud Provider) and AI security space](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Content strategy should focus on long-tail SEO, thought leadership, and attaching to established experts](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Video content and interviews with industry leaders can help build relationships and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [A mix of high-quality, technical content and broader educational pieces is recommended](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [GrowthX can potentially help with content creation, but has a 4-6 week waitlist currently](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Topics

### AnySource Company Overview

  - [Raised $11M from Kostla and Felicis](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Focused on MCP, SAP enablement, and MCP security](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Currently selling through direct sales, no PLG onboarding yet](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Target audience: CIO, CISO, AI platform teams, DevOps](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Selling secure AI enablement to help security teams push forward Frontier AI](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Content Marketing Strategy

  - [Plant seeds with high-quality, long-tail content to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [Create a mix of thought leadership and educational content](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Leverage interviews and video content with industry experts](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Start with a lower volume (2-3 pieces/week) to establish quality, then scale up](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Consider creating separate sections for thought leadership and long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

### Brand Building Tactics

  - [Coordinate a big product announcement with multiple channels (newsletters, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Engage with top AI newsletters and publications for maximum reach](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Conduct video interviews with CISOs, AI experts, and security professionals](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Create short-form video content for social media platforms](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

### Website and Technical Considerations

  - [Current website on Framer, planning to move to a new framework (supported by Figma)](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Need to create a blog or content section (e.g., /guides)](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Zero domain authority and backlinks currently, requiring time to build up](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Cursor is driving the market in the MCP space](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Opportunity to work with Cursor, Windsurf, and other IDE companies](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Security teams are looking for ways to enable AI safely](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### GrowthX Services and Approach

  - [Offer an 8-week strategy sprint to develop and calibrate content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Can help with "zero to one" launch for new companies](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Use AI-powered tools and workflows to scale content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Maintain high-quality standards through editorial processes and expert review](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to set up a Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [GrowthX to introduce Andy to Branka for potential fractional marketing leadership](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a more detailed strategy proposal for launching AnySource's content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Andy to review the discussion and consider next steps for engaging GrowthX or other marketing resources](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Andy to consider hiring a full-time or fractional marketing leader to drive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ooxxyABrSgFmDjpxLYej9FV8ZvzTRAXZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
